items.name_en: 💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
items.name_cn:
💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁

specs.rawTitle:
💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁

items.name_en: Original leather
items.name_cn:
Original leather
11050A
Nappa leather Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature knotted bow. This version is made of Nappa leather.
Flamenco can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, or an A5 notebook, a 0.5L bottle, and sunglasses case
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch
Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Gold suede lining
Loewe hot-stamped or hot-pressed 30-19-24

items.name_en: Genuine leather
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
New arrival Soft Calfskin
*1776 Large Leather Flamenco Purse
The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design inspired by the Flamenco series aesthetic, reinterpreting signature details like the side knots and donut chain in a larger proportion. This large version is made of soft Nappa lambskin with matching metal hardware.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap
Removable donut chain, embellished with Anagram Pebble
Exquisite magnetic snap closure
Size 41-26-9

items.name_en: ❤️In Stock! Fully leather cubi lunch box bag
items.name_cn:
❤️In Stock! Fully leather cubi lunch box bag
Nappa calfskin. Compared to the jacquard version, this all-leather style is more minimalist, elegant, and lightweight. The new colorway is adorable too ✋. There is a small heart charm on the hardware of the drawstring; the details are spot on and hit the spot, sisters, grab yours quickly 💓💓💓Size: 20.5×17×12.5cm

Fold Shopper is really amazing~
Latest runway shopping bag/mom bag
Shape: The silhouette is super great, natural and lazy yet unique
Paper grain cowhide: Lightweight and comfortable to wear, folds flat at the bottom, travel essential
Long/Short shoulder strap: Flexible switching, looks great as a shoulder bag or handbag, suitable for daily commute, short trips, business trips
Works as a mom bag too, very stylish and practical! Go for it!
